title: Nursery Rhyme. CCL. Charms.
content:
Hickup, hickup, go away!
        Come again another day;
        Hickup, hickup, when I bake,
        I'll give to you a butter-cake.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCL. Charms."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
